completed: Secure feedback API for Admin-only access
Add status management (PATCH) and deletion (DELETE) for feedback
Create FeedbackReview frontend page with filtering and pagination
Strictly restrict feedback management to Admin role across UI and Backend

decisions.decision: Switched from date-fns to native Intl.DateTimeFormat to avoid adding new dependencies and fix Vite 500 errors.
decisions.trade_offs: Native Intl is slightly more verbose but avoids bundle bloat and installation issues.

decisions.decision: Implemented triple-layer protection (Backend RoleGuard, AppRouter ProtectedRoute, and Component-level useAuth check).
decisions.trade_offs: Redundant but ensures maximum security as requested by the user.
